why_belief_over_hybrid_residual_gallery.hybrid_light: useful predecessor, but belief final validation supersedes it and keeps trace-conditioned uncertainty/history in the official readout
why_belief_over_hybrid_residual_gallery.clean_residual_v2: not paper-valid as strongest mainline; decision reports did not support official story strongly enough
why_belief_over_hybrid_residual_gallery.trace_gallery_assoc: gallery/prototype did not beat frozen external teacher and legacysem cleanly enough across ID/OOD
why_belief_over_hybrid_residual_gallery.trace_belief_assoc: current source-of-truth reports show improved_vs_calibration/cropenc/legacysem=true, utility=true, OOD=true, bootstrap_claim_level=strong_claim
